prompt: Deploy security patch to all running nodes concurrently, enforcing atomic updates via locks.
agent_thoughts: Orchestrator: Splitting this task into 3 sub-tasks, providing agents with access to a central token/lock ring.
plan: Spawn 3 agents. Each agent must acquire the state_lock before checking nodes_patched and applying the patch.
patch: All 3 nodes patched successfully without collision.
reason: Race condition resolved. A2A locking protocol forced agents to synchronize state changes, properly bringing nodes_patched from 0 to 3.
